metadata.description: Search for adoptable dogs near ZIP 10001, open the first result's profile, and click the heart icon to save it as a favorite (requires login).

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: On Petfinder, search for adoptable dogs near ZIP code 10001, open the profile of the first dog listed, and save it as a favorite by clicking the heart icon. You will need to sign in or create an account to complete this action.
